name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans offers car title loans in Memphis with same-day funding up to $50,000. Serves borrowers with bad credit and past bankruptcies.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a physical location at 1473 S Trezevant St in Memphis, Tennessee, specializing in auto title loans as emergency financing solutions. The company advertises rapid approval and funding, promoting a "sign up by noon, get cash today" model that positions it squarely in the emergency-cash lending space. The business accepts applicants regardless of credit history, explicitly welcoming those with bad credit and past bankruptcies.

The company offers secured loans ranging from $100 to $2,000 for smaller emergency needs, with larger title loans available up to $50,000. Their stated process allows borrowers to obtain cash while keeping their vehicle, with repayment required to recover the car title. The application process is marketed as online-accessible and straightforward, completed through their website portal. Customer reviews consistently mention a staff member named Alfred who assists with applications and explains terms.

Swift Title Loans distinguishes itself through accessible credit standards (no minimum credit score), competitive rate positioning within regional lenders, and a welcoming office atmosphere according to reviewers. The company emphasizes security with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption for online applications. Physical location hours extend to 7pm on weekdays and 10am-5pm Saturday, attempting to accommodate working customers. Phone and email support are available for inquiries.

However, the business model carries inherent risks common to title lending: customers must pledge vehicle ownership as collateral, creating risk of vehicle loss if unable to repay. Customer feedback reveals operational gaps including limited online self-service tools, no mobile app for payment management, inconsistent signage, and crowded parking during peak hours. The competitive rate claims are not substantiated by specific APR figures or fee schedules on the reviewed website content. Reviews, while positive, appear potentially promotional rather than independently verified.
pros: Accepts applicants with bad credit, past bankruptcies, and no collateral requirements (unsecured option mentioned)
Same-day or next-day cash funding advertised with online application option
Loan range from $100-$2,000 for immediate needs up to $50,000 for larger borrowing
Allows borrowers to retain vehicle possession while holding title as collateral
Extended weekday hours (9am-7pm Mon-Fri) and Saturday availability (10am-5pm)
Staff assistance with application and paperwork (specifically mentioned: Alfred)
SSL/TLS security encryption for online applications
Competitive rates compared to other regional finance lenders per customer reviews
cons: Vehicle title held as collateral creates risk of repossession if payments are missed
No specific APR, fees, or interest rate information disclosed on website
Limited online self-service capabilities; no mobile app for account management or payment reminders
Physical location signage unclear for first-time visitors; parking lot capacity issues noted
Limited payment plan options and inflexible scheduling per customer feedback
best_for: Individuals with bad credit or recent bankruptcy needing emergency cash within hours
Vehicle owners needing $1,000-$5,000 quickly who can pledge a car title
Borrowers seeking same-day funding who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or payday loans
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for individuals with damaged credit or recent bankruptcy who own a vehicle and need emergency cash within 24 hours, typically $1,000-$5,000. The primary caveat is that this is a secured loan using your vehicle title as collateral—failure to repay can result in vehicle repossession, making it higher-risk than unsecured alternatives if available. Borrowers should verify current APR and fees before committing, as these critical terms are not disclosed on the reviewed website.
services: Car title loans secured by vehicle ownership
In-person application assistance at Memphis location
